gaps.title: Add TraitFormationControl for declarative multi-agent geometric formation (A-009 example-driven request)
gaps.description: While refreshing SwarmMasteryDemo for A009 Phase 2, the scene needed a way to declare 'hold a triangle formation at 4m separation' for the miner swarm. @mitosis handles spawn/delegation but has no formation-geometry concept. @csp_channel (stress-tested separately) handles corridor arbitration but is too low-level for a declarative scene. A @formation_control trait would accept a shape enum (triangle, V, column, circle), inter-agent spacing, and a reference anchor entity, then emit per-agent target positions that PID controllers or navmesh solvers can consume. Suggested API shape: `@formation_control(shape: 'triangle', spacing: 3.0, anchor: 'Commander', sync_rate_hz: 10)`.
